title: stachys agraria
intro: Stachys agraria, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its square stem and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. Wood Betony is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Stachys agraria include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
